name: Mild Coconut Fish Curry
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Firm white fish, boned and cubed
5 oz Grated coconut (or a can of coconut milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the shallots, garlic, and mustard seeds. Fry for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
2. Dust the fish with flour and briefly seal both sides in the hot oil.
3. Add the remaining spices (cinnamon or cassia), tamarind pulp, turmeric, and coconut to the skillet. Pour in enough water (or coconut milk) to cover the fish.
4. Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and cover. Simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in the grated coconut until well combined with the sauce. Remove from heat.
